name: ai_eval_harness
description: TypeScript eval harness for job-fit scoring models

scriptsDescription.build: Compiles the TypeScript project using the configuration specified in tsconfig.json.
scriptsDescription.typecheck: Performs type checking on the TypeScript project without emitting any output files.
scriptsDescription.golden:sample: Runs the script to generate or sample golden data from an export, using src/cli/sample-golden-from-export.ts.
scriptsDescription.golden:validate: Validates the golden jobs data in data/golden_jobs.jsonl using the script src/cli/validate-golden.ts.
scriptsDescription.golden:validate:strict: Validates the golden jobs data with stricter size constraints (min-size 80, max-size 100, strict-size enabled) using src/cli/validate-golden.ts.
scriptsDescription.promptfoo:tests: Builds Promptfoo test cases from golden jobs data and outputs them to data/promptfoo_tests.yaml using src/cli/build-promptfoo-tests.ts.
scriptsDescription.eval:baseline: Creates the results/latest directory, validates golden data, builds Promptfoo tests, and runs a Promptfoo evaluation with the promptfooconfig.yaml configuration, outputting results in JSON and HTML formats with the description 'baseline'.
scriptsDescription.week1:baseline: Creates the results/week1_baseline directory, performs strict validation of golden data, builds Promptfoo tests, and runs a Promptfoo evaluation with the promptfooconfig.yaml configuration, outputting results in JSON and HTML formats with the description 'week1-baseline'.
scriptsDescription.eval:tagged: Runs the eval-tagged script located at src/cli/eval-tagged.ts.
scriptsDescription.iterations:summary: Runs the summarize-iterations script located at src/cli/summarize-iterations.ts to generate a summary of iterations.
scriptsDescription.golden:generate-fake: Generates fake job records using @faker-js/faker and appends them to data/golden_jobs.jsonl. Accepts --count, --seed, and --output flags.
scriptsDescription.tournament:smoke: Runs Round 1 (smoke test) of the tournament — all models against 10 stratified jobs. Drops models that can't parse JSON or score above random.
scriptsDescription.tournament:qualifying: Runs Round 2 (qualifying) — smoke survivors against 30 jobs. Drops models below 55% accuracy or with high parse failure.
scriptsDescription.tournament:full: Runs Round 3 (full eval) — qualifying survivors against all 103 golden jobs using eval-tagged.
scriptsDescription.tournament:auto: Runs all 3 tournament rounds back-to-back automatically, passing survivors forward.

scripts.eval:baseline: mkdir -p results/latest && npm run golden:validate && npm run promptfoo:tests && npx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.yaml -o results/latest/eval.json -o results/latest/eval.html --description baseline
scripts.week1:baseline: mkdir -p results/week1_baseline && npm run golden:validate:strict && npm run promptfoo:tests && npx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.yaml -o results/week1_baseline/eval.json -o results/week1_baseline/eval.html --description week1-baseline
